inputEvidence.determination: METADATA COVERAGE PARTIAL — EXTRACTION PROTOTYPE ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
EXTRACTION PROTOTYPE PARTIAL — VALIDATION ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
EXTRACTION VALIDATION PARTIAL — CONFIDENCE VALIDATION ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
CONFIDENCE VALIDATION RECOVERY PARTIAL — REASSESSMENT ALLOWED WITH REVIEW BUCKETS
DIRECTIONAL EVIDENCE CHAIN COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE REVIEW ALLOWED
GOVERNANCE REVIEW COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — GOVERNANCE PACKAGE ALLOWED
GOVERNANCE PACKAGE COMPLETE WITH REVIEW BUCKETS — V691 ASSESSMENT ALLOWED

preservingConditions: Directional intelligence remains awareness-supporting and does not become navigation, turn-by-turn, or route-guidance behavior.
Runtime evaluation, if ever separately authorized, is contained behind protection gates and downgrade rules.
Review-required candidates remain isolated from runtime confidence until manually resolved.
No display, Route Watch, Alerts, Awareness, DriveTexas, or Transportation Intelligence coupling occurs in V691.
violatingConditions: Using directional evidence for navigation or route guidance.
Displaying NB/SB/EB/WB labels without separate authorization and display validation.
Promoting review buckets or bearing-only evidence into runtime confidence.
Connecting directional outputs to protected systems or county activation paths.

evidenceReadinessReview.metadataGovernance: partial metadata coverage accepted only with preserved review buckets from V683.
evidenceReadinessReview.extractionGovernance: V684 extraction is usable for assessment only because rejected/review records remain identified.
evidenceReadinessReview.validationGovernance: V685 validation is partial and allows confidence validation with review buckets, not runtime.
evidenceReadinessReview.confidenceGovernance: V686R recovered confidence evaluation but leaves 81 review-required records.
evidenceReadinessReview.evidenceGovernance: V688/V689/V690 complete the governance chain with review buckets and explicit non-authorization.
conditions: manual treatment for all review-required records
display validation before any future display consideration

confidenceReadinessReview.reviewBucketAcceptanceRationale: Review buckets are acceptable for governance and assessment only because they are preserved, isolated, and not silently promoted.

reversible_lane.protection: isolate; require manual lane-operation semantics review
reversible_lane.prohibition: block runtime if reversible state cannot be deterministically sourced

construction_segment.protection: isolate; require current construction status and source freshness
construction_segment.prohibition: block runtime if construction status is stale or unresolved

hov_hot_lane.protection: isolate; require managed-lane rules and time-of-day semantics
hov_hot_lane.prohibition: block runtime if managed-lane access rules are absent

missing_county.prohibition: block runtime if county containment is unknown

missing_oneway.prohibition: block runtime if direction depends on bearing only

missing_ref.protection: isolate; require stable roadway reference identity
missing_ref.prohibition: block runtime if segment identity is ambiguous

manual_review_required.prohibition: block runtime until disposition is complete

enforcementControls: fail validation if bearing is sole directional source
block runtime and display on bearing-only records

runtimeSafetyRequirements.minimumRequirement: complete V683-V690 evidence chain with parseable artifacts and stable source traceability
all runtime-considered records must have non-bearing confidence and no unresolved review bucket
review buckets must be isolated, manually resolved, or downgraded unavailable
unsafe or uncertain records downgrade to no directional runtime value
single-step rollback to no directional runtime evaluation on regression triggers
county containment must be validated before county-specific use or expansion
no display unless separately authorized after display readiness validation

expectations: remove directional output from downstream consumers

prerequisitesBeforeNBSBEBWBCouldEverBeCo: non-bearing directional evidence for display candidates

runtimeConsiderationGates.name: Evidence chain complete
runtimeConsiderationGates.rationale: V683 through V690 evidence exists and V690 allows V691 assessment.

runtimeConsiderationGates.name: Governance complete
runtimeConsiderationGates.rationale: V690 governance package is complete with review buckets.

runtimeConsiderationGates.name: Review bucket treatment defined
runtimeConsiderationGates.rationale: Treatment is identified, but 81 records still need manual resolution before runtime consideration.

runtimeConsiderationGates.name: Bearing policy enforced
runtimeConsiderationGates.rationale: Bearing-only policy passes with 0 bearing-only candidates and explicit prohibitions.

runtimeConsiderationGates.name: Display readiness reviewed
runtimeConsiderationGates.rationale: Display readiness is not established and display is not authorized.

runtimeConsiderationGates.name: Separate future authorization
runtimeConsiderationGates.rationale: No future runtime authorization exists in V691.

nextPhaseRecommendation: V692 — Directional Runtime Protection Framework (assessment/governance only; not runtime integration or display)
finalDetermination: RUNTIME READINESS ASSESSMENT COMPLETE WITH CONDITIONS — FUTURE EVALUATION ALLOWED
